prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX4202R with billet compressor wheel (3.4L Lambda II RS 5.0L V8 engine code: GDI - TAU) for 750+ WHP on E85, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converters to maintain backpressure while reducing restriction

Full fuel system overhaul with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch-can system to prevent oil dilution in the direct-injection Lambda II RS V8

Custom ECU reflash via HP Tuners with a Genesis-specific OS ID (12680001) to optimize ignition timing, cam phasing, and boost control, paired with an AEM 30-0300 X-Series wideband AFR gauge for real-time monitoring of the 12.5:1 air-fuel ratio under full load
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (G90-specific, not a repurposed G80 kit) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and blacked-out Genesis badges

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #DFV 22G90-01) with 20-way adjustable damping and 30mm front/25mm rear lowering, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering

Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (G90-exclusive) featuring a 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing with adjustable angle of attack (up to 15 degrees), side skirts with integrated LED turn signals, and a custom front canard set for improved downforce at speeds above 120 mph
